Skillchain

Your skills certified in Blockchain

Skillchain is the definitive protocol in which universities, companies, and training companies meet to certify & guarantee skills permanently thanks to blockchain technology.

Skillchain B2C

Skillchain B2C allows individuals to crystalize files of any nature and save them in Blockchain technology. Try the skillchain platform for free.

Skillchain B2B

Skillchain B2B allows companies or professionals a skillchain that is used by companies from different sectors for different uses.

University

With skill chain, universities can issue digital certificates thanks to the Blockchain technology adapted to be scalable and efficient. 

Training Companies

Digital course completion certificates have become fundamental for Brand Awareness that with Skillchain can be propagated safely & without point of failure.

Gaming Companies

Gaming companies use Skillchain to certify the results obtained by their gamers & enhance their performance.

Lawyers

Crystallizing documentation & proving the authorship of documents in a few simple clicks & without the use of third parties in the advantage that Skillchain brings to all
professionals who want to protect themselves
from plagiarism and/or falsification.

Researchers

The academic world wants to preserve the works of intellect & research before publication in trade journals & specialized periodicals.

Publishers

The publisher’s priority is to clearly & transparently demonstrate the results obtained by their authors in terms of copies sold & results in the Amazon rankings.

Artists

A digital or physical work can be protected thanks to the Skillchain. Artists can protect their works in a few simple steps & affirm their definitive authorship.

Skillchain

We have designed Skillchain to increase the sales of your company, your professional office or your training school. Blockchain technology, lead generation, up-selling & brand awareness are the key points of Skillchain.

Blockchain Technology

The Skillchain platform allows the creation of a unique cryptographic code & its storage inside the Blockchain ledger in a few seconds. In addition to crystallizing the file forever, thanks to Skillchain you have the possibility to express the issuer of the file (mp3, mp4, jpg, pdf) in Trustless mode, tracing it back to your corporate entity forever.

Lead generation

Skillchain offers useful solutions for lead generation, drastically reducing cost. The page containing the information on the digital certificate becomes a means of sharing the training results obtained & a vehicle for the acquisition of new leads.

Up-selling Brand Awareness

Plan a Brand Awareness-based strategy & make yourself known to a new audience for free. Sharing is the foundation of personal gratification.

Are you a training company, university or freelancer and want to try Skillchain?

Book a demo

Blockchain Technology

thanks to the set-up of different smart contracts, Skillchain is able to demonstrate without failure points who is the issuer of a certificate & crystallize it in the public distributed ledger.

The efficiency & effectiveness introduced by Skillchain is unparalleled, it manages up to 1000 certificates per second in the “Enterprise” plan.

Lead generation

Celebrating professional goals is essential for students, artists, trainees and writers. Skillchain creates a personalized link for each student of your company, creating moments of sharing and brand awareness, useful for expanding your customer base.

Up Selling

Skillchain creates a new channel to sell services and products. Thanks to sharing and new interactions you can create up-selling and cross-selling policies.

Skillchain offers White Label, Co-Branding solutions with annual subscriptions and ad-hoc customizations.

PROFESSIONAL

  • SET-UP: Skillchain Layer Creation

  • STORAGE: documents-certificates (mp3 / mp4 / jpg / pdf) / Max 3 GB per month

  • FOLDER CUSTOMIZATION

  • CERTIFICATES CUSTOMIZATION

  • AUTOMATED CSV FILE UPLOAD

  • LEAD GENERATION

  • UP-SELLING

  • CUSTOMIZATION: Co-Branding

SKI FAQ

1) What is SKI?

SKI is an ERC-20 token that you can also use to purchase the ” PROFESSIONAL ” and ” ENTERPRISE ” packages.

2) How can I pay with SKI?

First you need to buy SKI here.

Once you have purchased the default quantity in your ” PROFESSIONAL ” or ” ENTERPRISE ” plan, write an email to hello@skillchain.io to make the payment.
